subject: Boxue/tanxi: Rank high-value knowledge gaps
description:
Boxue delegation plan: boxue_1783712849963800200
Project: Can We Predict the Next Pandemic? Zoonotic Spillover Early-Warning Mechanisms (sci_1783712823087419700)
Domain: Pandemic Prediction / Zoonotic Spillover / One Health / Epidemiology / Climate and Environmental Science / Public Health
Project objective: 围绕一个可证伪的科学问题：'人类驱动的环境扰动、宿主动物空间移动、气候异常与交通连通性，是否通过可测量的生态接触重组机制，共同决定人畜共患病溢出的时间窗口与地理热点；该机制能否提供早于传统病例监测的预警信号？'
Round goal: 不要泛泛比较'哪种AI模型预测更好'。围绕一个可证伪的科学问题：'人类驱动的环境扰动、宿主动物空间移动、气候异常与交通连通性，是否通过可测量的生态接触重组机制，共同决定人畜共患病溢出的时间窗口与地理热点；该机制能否提供早于传统病例监测的预警信号？'
Assigned agent: tanxi
Phase: Gap Discovery
Priority: high
Allowed/expected tools: run_tanxi_gap_exploration, detect_knowledge_gaps, check_semantic_plausibility, assess_novelty, verify_uniqueness

Task:
Use PaperGraph evidence to detect density holes, suspended problems, contradictions, and migration gaps.

Deliverable:
Ranked gap list with supporting references and pseudo-gap risk checks.

Acceptance criteria:
- Every reported gap has supporting references or is flagged as ungrounded
- No more than 10 ranked gaps
- Each gap includes novelty/value/feasibility rationale

Known risks to handle:
- pseudo-gaps
- uncovered subfields mistaken as real gaps

Role boundary: complete only this specialist responsibility. Do not take over Boxue coordination, do not invent evidence, and mark unsupported claims for review.
Output should be compact structured JSON suitable for downstream agents.
